etymology: Horse-lover = Philip (Greek philos + hippos); Fat = Dick (German)
wordplay_note: Philip K. Dick's name literally translated — the author as character
card_description: Horselover Fat (meaning "Horse-lover = Philip (Greek philos + hippos); Fat = Dick (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. PKD's alter ego and the mentally ill visionary protagonist who experiences divine revelation. Name note: Philip K. Dick's name literally translated — the author as character. The author splits himself in two to examine his own 2-3-74 theophany. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: PKD's alter ego and the mentally ill visionary protagonist who experiences divine revelation
